item.title: Trump administration acknowledges it needs immigrant farmworkers as it moves to cut their pay
item.description:
The Trump administration handed down a rule that would cut the minimum wage for immigrants with H-2A visas, including farm workers. The United Farm Workers sued, arguing the change would depress pay to all agricultural employees, including citizens.

The post Trump administration acknowledges it needs immigrant farmworkers as it moves to cut their pay appeared first on Long Beach Post News.

item.title: Driver charged with killing high schooler sitting at bus stop gets 6 months of jail time
item.description:

item.title: California passed a law to curb spikes in gas prices. Why isn’t it using those powers now?
item.description:
California built a first-in-the-nation system to police refinery profits during price spikes. Regulators delayed it for five years. Gasoline has surged to record highs as global oil markets spike amid the Iran war. The spike exposes a deeper problem: fewer refineries and limited California fuel supply.

The post California passed a law to curb spikes in gas prices. Why isn’t it using those powers now? appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/13095414/030926-socal-gas-prices-zc-cm-15-462727-gx0kafyw-639971-U9XadmiO-1024x682.webp)
California built a first-in-the-nation system to police refinery profits during price spikes. Regulators delayed it for five years. Gasoline has surged to record highs as global oil markets spike amid the Iran war. The spike exposes a deeper problem: fewer refineries and limited California fuel supply.
The post [California passed a law to curb spikes in gas prices. Why isn’t it using those powers now?](https://lbpost.com/news/california-passed-a-law-to-curb-spikes-in-gas-prices-why-isnt-it-using-those-powers-now) appeared first on [Long Beach Post News](https://lbpost.com/news).

item.title: Long Beach’s streets are too dangerous, solutions too slow, City Council says
item.description:
Tired of long delays and a lack of answers, the City Council wants closer oversight of how the Public Works Department handles requests for new stop signs, left-turn signals, crosswalks and other safety measures.

The post Long Beach’s streets are too dangerous, solutions too slow, City Council says appeared first on Long Beach Post News.

item.title: ‘Shocking’: What Supreme Court ruling on transgender policy means for California students
item.description:
The court blocked California’s policy barring school districts from requiring teachers to “out” transgender students to their parents, unless the students gave permission.

The post ‘Shocking’: What Supreme Court ruling on transgender policy means for California students appeared first on Long Beach Post News.

The post [‘Shocking’: What Supreme Court ruling on transgender policy means for California students](https://lbpost.com/news/education/shocking-what-supreme-court-ruling-on-transgender-policy-means-for-california-students) appeared first on [Long Beach Post News](https://lbpost.com/news).

item.title: Cambodian Genocide survivor released from ICE custody after court order
item.description:
Yi, who fled the genocide and came to the U.S. with her family in 1981, was detained by ICE at a routine immigration check-in in Santa Ana on Jan. 8 and held at the Adelanto Detention Facility for almost two months.

The post Cambodian Genocide survivor released from ICE custody after court order appeared first on Long Beach Post News.

item.title: A total lunar eclipse is happening Tuesday, when the Earth turns the moon ‘blood’ red
item.description:
It’s called the “Blood Moon” because of the red hue the earth’s atmosphere refracts onto the lunar surface as light from the sun passes through it.

The post A total lunar eclipse is happening Tuesday, when the Earth turns the moon ‘blood’ red appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:

It’s called the “Blood Moon” because of the red hue the earth’s atmosphere refracts onto the lunar surface as light from the sun passes through it.
